hypothesis: If a cross-modal predictive model trained to predict each modality from the other two in latent space with VIC and contrastive losses is evaluated on Matbench tasks, then it will achieve lower MAE for Band Gap, Shear Modulus, Bulk Modulus, Dielectric, and Perovskites formation energy than single-modality baselines (CGCNN, CoGN, ALIGNN) because integrating graph, text, and XRD modalities yields richer latent representations that improve predictive accuracy.
